Test-WslAvailable.should return true when wsl --status succeeds
Test-WslAvailable.should return false when wsl --status fails
Test-WslAvailable.should return false when Invoke-Wsl throws an exception
Test-WslAvailable.should return false when WSL status check times out
Test-IsAdmin.should return boolean
Exit-Script.should be a function
Request-AdminElevation.when running as administrator.should not show UAC prompt
Request-AdminElevation.when running as administrator.should return without action
Request-AdminElevation.when not running as administrator.should show UAC message
Request-AdminElevation.when not running as administrator.should start elevated process
Request-AdminElevation.when not running as administrator.should pass script path in arguments
Request-AdminElevation.when not running as administrator.should call Exit-Script with exit code 0
Request-AdminElevation.parameter passing.should pass string parameters
Request-AdminElevation.parameter passing.should pass switch parameters
Request-AdminElevation.parameter passing.should pass hashtable parameters
SetupContext.コンストラクタ.should set DotfilesPath correctly
SetupContext.コンストラクタ.should default DistroName to NixOS
SetupContext.コンストラクタ.should set InstallDir to USERPROFILE\NixOS
SetupContext.コンストラクタ.should initialize Options as empty hashtable
SetupContext.GetOption.should return TestValue when key exists
SetupContext.GetOption.should return DefaultValue when key does not exist
SetupContext.GetOption.should return for default value type null
SetupContext.GetOption.should return False for default value type false
SetupContext.GetOption.should return 42 for default value type number
SetupContext.プロパティ設定.should allow setting DistroName to Ubuntu
SetupContext.プロパティ設定.should allow setting InstallDir to C:\WSL\NixOS
SetupContext.プロパティ設定.should allow setting multiple keys in Options
SetupResult.コンストラクタ.should default Success to False
SetupResult.コンストラクタ.should default Message to
SetupResult.コンストラクタ.should default Error to null
SetupResult.CreateSuccess.should create success result with correct properties
SetupResult.CreateSuccess.should allow empty message
SetupResult.CreateFailure.should create failure result without exception
SetupResult.CreateFailure.should create failure result with exception
SetupResult.CreateFailure.should allow null exception
SetupHandlerBase.プロパティ.should default Order to 100
SetupHandlerBase.プロパティ.should default RequiresAdmin to False
SetupHandlerBase.プロパティ.should allow setting Order
SetupHandlerBase.プロパティ.should allow setting Name
SetupHandlerBase.プロパティ.should allow setting Description
SetupHandlerBase.CanApply (基底クラス).should throw exception for base class CanApply
SetupHandlerBase.Apply (基底クラス).should throw exception for base class Apply
SetupHandlerBase.CreateSuccessResult.should create success result with handler name
SetupHandlerBase.CreateFailureResult.should create failure result without exception
SetupHandlerBase.CreateFailureResult.should create failure result with exception
SetupHandlerBase.NeedsConsent.should return false when ConsentKey is empty
SetupHandlerBase.NeedsConsent.should return true when ConsentKey is set
SetupHandlerBase.GetConsentFilePath.should return path under .config/dotfiles
SetupHandlerBase.ReadConsentFlag.should return null when ConsentKey is empty
SetupHandlerBase.ReadConsentFlag.should return null when consent.json does not exist
SetupHandlerBase.ReadConsentFlag.should return true when key is true
SetupHandlerBase.ReadConsentFlag.should return false when key is false
SetupHandlerBase.ReadConsentFlag.should return null when key does not exist in JSON
SetupHandlerBase.ReadConsentFlag.should return null when JSON is corrupt
SetupHandlerBase.WriteConsentFlag.should create consent.json with true value
SetupHandlerBase.WriteConsentFlag.should create consent.json with false value
SetupHandlerBase.WriteConsentFlag.should preserve existing keys when writing
SetupHandlerBase.WriteConsentFlag.should update existing key value
SetupHandlerBase.WriteConsentFlag.should create directory if it does not exist
SetupHandlerBase.WriteConsentFlag.should handle corrupt JSON gracefully and overwrite
SetupHandlerBase.WriteConsentFlag.should do nothing when ConsentKey is empty
SetupHandlerBase.Log メソッド.should output message with Cyan color
SetupHandlerBase.Log メソッド.should output message with Yellow color
SetupHandlerBase.Log メソッド.should output message with Red color
SetupHandlerBase.Log メソッド.should allow custom color for Log method
